purpose: Stores authenticated seeker accounts used by the user module.

important_fields.name: id
important_fields.note: Primary identifier used by all user-owned records.

important_fields.name: role
important_fields.note: Must include 'user' for this module's protected actions.

important_fields.name: is_active
important_fields.note: Controls whether account can perform search/contact actions.

notes: Role-based authorization gates protected user flows.
